text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In addition to her daily training and social media
activity, Curren Chan is also making preparations
for the Cutie ♪ Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a result, she's extremely overworked, causing
everyone around her to worry for her health,
myself included.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Curren Chan pleads with me to let her
finish what she started. Her trust in me pays off,
and I allow her to tackle the workload alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, she succeeds at getting past the
worst of it and runs with a smile once more.
